message:
beads: defer coordinator beads for queue hygiene

Updated bd-mblr.4.3 (Deterministic Seed Matrix) status to deferred as it
serves as a coordination container for child implementation beads. This
keeps br ready/bv triage focused on executable leaf work while preserving
the original scope and acceptance criteria.

Status changes and queue-hygiene comments ensure completion is rolled up
from child task closures rather than blocking direct work item selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
